name: edgar
title: SEC EDGAR — Company Tickers
description: Every company with securities registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission — its Central Index Key (CIK), ticker symbol, exchange and legal name, from the SEC's EDGAR system.

cik.description: SEC EDGAR Central Index Key — the registrant's identifier in EDGAR, as an unpadded numeric string.

company_name.description: Legal name of the registrant as carried in the SEC company-tickers file.

ticker.description: Exchange ticker symbol for the registrant's security.

exchange.description: Listing venue for the ticker (e.g. NYSE, Nasdaq, CBOE, OTC).

corpus.description: Lowercased, accent-stripped concatenation of name + ticker + exchange — a derived free-text search field, not a source attribute.
